## Summary

Describe the user-facing change in a few sentences.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests were added or updated.
- [ ] Documentation was added or updated when public APIs changed.
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes.
- [ ] Breaking changes are called out clearly.

## Notes

Link related issues and mention any follow-up work.
